note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. populationInjectionPrompts loops i=0..getExtensionPromptMaxDepth() where MAX_INJECTION_DEPTH=10000 (script.js:499, getExtensionPromptMaxDepth script.js:3222). An injection deeper than the (reversed) history length splices past the array end, so `messages.splice(i, 0, ...)` appends at the tail of the reversed array and, after the final reverse (openai.js:864), lands at the TOP of the chat region. Depth requested 99999, clamped to the 10000 cap; two-message history. RPT reaches the same placement by clamping the index into the conversation region. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled.

input.description: One in-chat system injection at depth 10000 (requested 99999, clamped); lands above all chat messages.
